---
name: Sprint Task
about: Standard development task for a sprint.
title: 'feat/fix: '
labels: 'type: feature', 'priority: P2-Medium'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
Provide a clear description of the task, its scope, and why it is being implemented.

## Acceptance Criteria
Define precisely what must be true for this task to be considered complete.
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2

## Technical Notes / Spec Alignment
- **Spec Document**: [e.g. docs/architecture/API_REFERENCE.md]
- **Proposed Changes**: Detail any package, function, or table modifications.

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] Code written and self-reviewed.
- [ ] Unit tests added (aiming for >80% coverage).
- [ ] Linting checks passing (`make lint`).
- [ ] API integration tests passing (if applicable).
- [ ] PR created and approved.
